steps.title: No solution = parallel lines: same slope, different intercept
steps.content: Rewrite the given equation $2x = 20y - 8$ by dividing by 2: $x = 10y - 4$. The slope ratio (coefficient of $x$ to coefficient of $y$) is $1:10$.

steps.title: Find the choice with the same slope ratio but different intercept
steps.content: Choice B: $\frac{1}{2}x = 5y$ → $x = 10y$. Slope ratio is $1:10$ — same as the original — but the constant term is $0 \neq -4$, so these are parallel lines with no intersection. Choices A and C are equivalent to the original (not parallel, same line); D is equivalent to A.

steps.title: Confirm
steps.content: Parallel lines (same slope, different intercept) produce no solution. That matches choice B — B is correct.
